positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a rising sun over a mountain range, rendered in a geometric, abstract Art Deco style. The sun is a perfect semi-circle with sharp rays extending outwards, transitioning through gradients of deep coral, warm saffron, and soft lavender. The mountain peaks are depicted using clean, interlocking shapes and silhouettes, providing strong contrast against the bright sky. The composition is highly centralized, with negative space emphasized around the core subject matter. Style: Bold vector art, screen print quality, high contrast line work, limited color palette, suitable for textile printing. Studio lighting, maximum crispness, zero gradients in the foreground elements.
negative: blur, grainy, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, abstract expressionism, photorealistic, low resolution, poor composition, duplicate, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, muted colors
